recent_excerpts: Black Hills Information Security released GoSpoof, a Python tool that opens all ports on a honeypot to capture attacker scanning patterns and payloads in real time.
Malwarebytes integrated its scam-checking threat intelligence directly into Anthropic's Claude AI assistant — users can now query suspicious links, phone numbers, or email…
Black Hills InfoSec published a practical guide to OSINT — covering collection methods, analysis frameworks, and operational security controls to protect analysts from exposure.
